design_decisions.summary: Temp directory lifecycle — download to os.MkdirTemp, feed to Vendor(), clean on return; no persistent cache.
Digest algorithm SHA-256 — crypto/sha256 stdlib, hex-encoded, stored as upstream-digest: sha256:<hex> in VERSION.
VERSION record written after successful Vendor — commit SHA + digest written only on nil error so a failed run leaves no stale pin.
Flag semantics — --upstream makes positional source-dir optional; --tag/--repo only apply with --upstream; no --tag uses pinned semver from baton.Version().
No SourceProvider interface — single FetchUpstream(ctx, repo, tag) (*FetchResult, error) function called from cmd/sworn/baton.go; no pipeline change.
